title: Ray-PvP Textures
description: Ray-PvP Textures - Texture pack for Minecraft 1.16.5: short swords, green-purple GUI, and a small cursor for PvP. Compatible with OptiFine.
body:
A texture pack for Minecraft 1.16.5, perfect for PvP. It includes:

Shortened swords, resembling knives, for better visibility.
Green and purple-themed GUI for a stylish look.
A smaller cursor for precise aiming.
